arts.sum: Michael Frey, fit again after missing the defeat at West Brom with a minor injury, is back in the QPR side at the Riverside Stadium. arts.ttl: Relief club remedied mistake of selling player to Middlesbrough – Now an absolute star for them
arts.sum: Marten de Roon has been a constant figure in Atalanta’s starting lineup since returning to the club from Middlesbrough in 2017. Gian Piero Gasperini took charge of the Serie A club in June 2016 and in his first transfer window, he sanctioned the midfielder’s sale to Boro. arts.ttl: Michael Carrick now needing a leaf out of Aitor Karanka's book for Middlesbrough play-off hopes
arts.sum: Michael Carrick’s team went close to matching them last season when Boro won five, drew four and lost just one game in the run-in, for a tally of 19 points. This suggests that Boro may need to match Karanka’s best finish of 22 points if they are to achieve the top six spot which we all believed was a near given at the start of this campaign.
